paper_title: FTIR Spectroscopy Analysis of Wall Components

methods.description: This method involves the use of FTIR spectroscopy to analyze the cell wall components of pollen tubes, particularly focusing on the effects of anti-CaM and W7-agarose on pollen germination and tube elongation.

steps.description: Pollen tubes were cultured in standard medium supplemented with 1.5 mg/mL anti-CaM and 40 mM W7-agarose for 3 days, then centrifuged at 500 rpm for 2 minutes and washed three times with deionized water.
steps.searchable_summary: Culture pollen tubes with anti-CaM and W7-agarose, centrifuge, and wash

steps.description: The pollen tubes were mounted on a barium fluoride window on the stage of the Nicolet NicPlan IR Microscope accessory of the Nicolet Magna-IR 750 FTIR spectrometer equipped with a liquid nitrogen-cooled mercury cadmium telluride detector.
steps.searchable_summary: Mount pollen tubes on FTIR spectrometer for analysis

steps.description: An area of the cell wall (100x100 mm) in the tip region was selected for spectral collection.
steps.searchable_summary: Select cell wall area for FTIR spectral collection

steps.description: Sixty-four interferograms were collected in transmission mode with a 4 cm-1 resolution and were co-added together to improve the signal-to-noise ratio.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect and co-add interferograms in transmission mode

steps.description: Three spectra were collected from each sample, and then averaged and baseline-corrected.

methods.description: This method uses Gaussian fitting to quantify the relative contents of esterified and acidic pectins in FTIR spectra, providing insights into the changes in pectin composition upon anti-CaM treatment.

steps.description: FTIR spectra were subjected to Gaussian fitting to quantify relative contents of acidic and esterified pectins using Origin 9.0 software.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform Gaussian fitting on FTIR spectra using Origin 9.0

steps.description: Ratio between esterified pectins and acidic pectins was calculated from percentages of characteristic peaks.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate ratio of esterified to acidic pectins from peak percentages

steps.description: Proportion of protein peaks to total absorption peaks was also calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate protein peak proportion in FTIR spectra
